mapper.select: select 'gmv' name, coalesce(sum(gmv), 0) value from dws_finance_day_profit union all select 'netAmount' name, coalesce(sum(net_amount), 0) value from dws_finance_day_profit union all select 'profitAmount' name, coalesce(sum(profit_amount), 0) value from dws_finance_day_profit union all select 'roi' name, coalesce(round(sum(net_amount) / nullif(sum(ad_cost), 0), 2), 0) value from dws_finance_day_profit

select date_format(dt, '%Y-%m-%d') name, coalesce(sum(gmv), 0) value from dws_finance_day_profit
group by dt order by dt

select date_format(dt, '%Y-%m-%d') name, coalesce(sum(profit_amount), 0) value from dws_finance_day_profit
group by dt order by dt

select dt, shop_id, shop_name, gmv, net_amount, product_cost, platform_fee, ad_cost, freight_fee, after_sale_cost, profit_amount, profit_amount share_profit_amount, coalesce(round(net_amount / nullif(ad_cost, 0), 2), 0) roi from dws_finance_day_profit
order by dt desc, profit_amount desc

select str_to_date(date_format(dt, '%Y-%m-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') dt, shop_id, max(shop_name) shop_name, sum(gmv) gmv, sum(net_amount) net_amount, sum(product_cost) product_cost, sum(platform_fee) platform_fee, sum(ad_cost) ad_cost, sum(freight_fee) freight_fee, sum(after_sale_cost) after_sale_cost, sum(profit_amount) profit_amount, sum(profit_amount) share_profit_amount, coalesce(round(sum(net_amount) / nullif(sum(ad_cost), 0), 2), 0) roi from dws_finance_day_profit
group by date_format(dt, '%Y-%m'), shop_id order by dt desc, profit_amount desc

select dt, shop_id, max(shop_name) shop_name, operator_id, max(operator_name) operator_name, channel_code, max(channel_name) channel_name, sum(gmv) gmv, sum(net_amount) net_amount, sum(product_cost) product_cost, sum(platform_fee) platform_fee, sum(ad_cost) ad_cost, sum(freight_fee) freight_fee, sum(after_sale_cost) after_sale_cost, sum(profit_amount) profit_amount, sum(share_profit_amount) share_profit_amount, coalesce(round(sum(net_amount) / nullif(sum(ad_cost), 0), 2), 0) roi from fin_operator_profit_day
group by dt, shop_id, operator_id, channel_code order by dt desc, profit_amount desc

select str_to_date(date_format(dt, '%Y-%m-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') dt, shop_id, max(shop_name) shop_name, operator_id, max(operator_name) operator_name, channel_code, max(channel_name) channel_name, sum(gmv) gmv, sum(net_amount) net_amount, sum(product_cost) product_cost, sum(platform_fee) platform_fee, sum(ad_cost) ad_cost, sum(freight_fee) freight_fee, sum(after_sale_cost) after_sale_cost, sum(profit_amount) profit_amount, sum(share_profit_amount) share_profit_amount, coalesce(round(sum(net_amount) / nullif(sum(ad_cost), 0), 2), 0) roi from fin_operator_profit_day
group by date_format(dt, '%Y-%m'), shop_id, operator_id, channel_code order by dt desc, profit_amount desc
